scope_lock_basis: sync 400, 10/10/10, no cube, Base5, treasure, partless boss, 180s; Attacker combat ATK ~118027

video.fight_window: combat starts ~6s (AMBUSH); ends ~186s; OPERATION COMPLETE by ~190s
video.notes: in-combat top DAMAGE counter is TEAM TOTAL (reaches ~1.369B ~= battle-records sum ~1.376B); NOT isolable to Soda. Popups render focus-only (Soda) per scope-lock.

battle_records.note: OPERATION COMPLETE TOTAL DAMAGE (1,265,480,832) is LOWER than the sum of unit damage rows (1,376,480,290) and lower than the in-combat counter's final value (~1,369,132,181); reason for the ~111M discrepancy not determined.

boss.type: spider/quadruped mech, glowing red core weak-point
boss.soda_advantage: YES (Soda is Iron; Iron > Electric on element wheel). Inferred, not visually confirmed on-screen.

full_bursts.interleave: team is B1(LM)+B2(Crown)+B3(Soda)+B3(Helm); the two Burst-III units alternate who casts B3, so FBs alternate Soda/Helm
full_bursts.soda_burst_evidence: 5 Golden-Chip consume drops (see golden_chip); Soda burst splash + 'Onward, Soda!' banner verified at t=48
full_bursts.note: All FBs measurably LONGER than base 10s (consistent with FB-extension). Both Soda AND Helm bursts show ~14s, so the full extension cannot be cleanly attributed to Soda's S2 alone from this footage. Soda burst at t=48 peaked 14.71s.

golden_chip.counter_location: gold coin icon near Soda (center-lower), number to its right
golden_chip.consume_evidence_exact: t=46 -> 44 chips; t=48 (Soda burst cast) -> 27 chips; 44-17 = 27 EXACT
golden_chip.rebuild_rate_per_s_approx: 0.3-0.5 (gains during Full Burst via normal attacks in FB per S1/S2)
golden_chip.cap_note: Chip starts at 50 but NEVER returns to 50 after the first burst; consume-17 outpaces the ~9-15 rebuilt per ~36s Soda cycle. So the 50-START and CONSUME-17 are validated; the 50-CAP re-hit is NOT testable here (never rebuilds that high).

hit_rate_core_test.hypothesis: Soda's burst grants Hit Rate +38.91% (20+ chips, 15s); does Hit Rate raise shotgun core-hit fraction?
hit_rate_core_test.result: INCONCLUSIVE / not cleanly resolvable from this footage
reasons: in-combat counter is TEAM TOTAL, so per-magazine reconciliation cannot isolate Soda's per-shot damage
shotgun pellet popups overlap into dense unreadable clusters (the exact failure mode SG discipline warns against; visual counting forbidden)
Soda's 15s buff windows coincide with Full Burst (+50% team dmg) and her own ATK buffs, confounding any per-pellet before/after comparison
reload and burst-splash timing rarely align with a clean readable shotgun-on-boss frame in a given buff state
hit_rate_core_test.qualitative_observation: Across sampled normal-fire frames in BOTH buff-active (t=20, inside FB1 post-Soda-burst) and buff-inactive (t=44, post-FB2) windows, popups were orange crits + white normals with NO clearly visible RED 'CORE HIT' numbers. No detectable surge of red core popups when the Hit-Rate buff is up. Confidence: LOW (red core popups could be hidden in dense clusters, so a low measured core rate cannot itself be trusted).

burst_nuke.note: 21,218,079 (white) is the largest burst-cast popup, appears as two stacked instances; overlapping numbers make exact attribution imperfect. Plausibly the 628.7% burst-skill hit landing with full team buffs + element advantage (possibly 2 instances/parts). Not independently confirmed.
